page.index.title: Fallacy Finder — Article Extractor
page.paste.title: Fallacy Finder — Paste Text
page.review.title: Fallacy Finder — Review Extracted Text
page.settings.title: Settings
page.library.title: Fallacy Library
brand.name: Fallacy Finder
index.brand_subtitle: Extract articles and surface questionable reasoning.
index.hero_title: Analyze the logic inside a news article, not the clutter around it.
index.hero_copy: Paste a URL and the app will extract the main body text, show you exactly what was captured, and only then continue to fallacy analysis.
index.paywall_alert: Some paywalled or heavily JavaScript-rendered pages may fail to extract cleanly.
index.history_copy: You can reuse the saved result, rerun the analysis, or cancel and enter another URL.
index.history_no_fallacies: No fallacies were found in the latest saved run.
index.history_hint_current_model_has_res: There is already a saved result created with your Current Model.
index.history_hint_current_model_missing: The current model does not have a saved result for this URL yet. If you re-run it, that new result will be saved.
index.alert_load_saved_failed: Could not load the saved result: {message}
index.alert_unknown_saved_result: Could not determine which saved result to load.
paste.brand_subtitle: Paste text directly and analyze it with your current provider and model.
paste.hero_title: Analyze pasted text without fetching a URL.
paste.hero_copy: Paste article text, a social post, a speech excerpt, or any other block of writing. The app will use the currently selected model and return the detected fallacies within the pasted content.
paste.text_placeholder: Paste the text you want to analyze here...
paste.text_help: Blank lines are treated as paragraph breaks. Keeping paragraph structure improves the quality of the analysis.
review.brand_subtitle: Confirm the extracted text before sending anything to the fallacy analyzer.
review.alert: Review the extracted text below. If it looks incomplete, garbled, or otherwise not the article you wanted, cancel and try another source or URL.
results.article_brand_subtitle: Review the extracted article and inspect highlighted passages.
results.pasted_brand_subtitle: Review the pasted text and inspect highlighted passages.
results.hover_help: Hover over highlighted text to view the fallacy type.
results.hover_click_help: Hover over highlighted text to view the fallacy type. Click a highlighted passage to expand the reasoning.
results.what_detected_mean: What do the detected fallacies mean?
results.article_cards_copy: Each card below explains a fallacy type detected in this article. Use it as a quick reference when reviewing the highlighted passages above.
results.pasted_cards_copy: Each card below explains a fallacy type detected in the pasted text. Use it as a quick reference while reviewing the highlighted passages above.
library.brand_subtitle: Browse the fallacy library, search it quickly, and open dedicated pages for each fallacy.
library.hero_title: A structured reference for the fallacies used throughout Fallacy Finder.
library.hero_copy: Use the search box to filter by name, alias, or description. Each entry opens a dedicated page with a definition, an example, and a fuller explanation.
library.search_placeholder: Search fallacies, aliases, categories, or keywords...
library.search_help: Results update instantly as you type. Exact names and aliases are prioritized.
library.empty_state: No fallacies matched your search. Try a broader keyword.
library.formal_copy: These focus on invalid logical form or broken argument structure.
library.informal_copy: These depend on weak support, misleading framing, bad evidence, or rhetorical shortcuts.
detail.related_heading: Related by logic, rhetoric, or real-world co-occurrence
detail.related_intro: These suggestions are ranked using a hybrid score that combines curated links, shared families, wording similarity, and any saved-analysis pairings the app has observed.
detail.toggle_related_shown: Toggle how many related fallacies are shown
settings.brand_subtitle: Swap providers, update models, and tune analysis behavior.
settings.page_copy: Everything here is stored in the application instance settings file
settings.alert_next_request: Changes take effect on the next request.
settings.connection_issue: Can not connect to AI provider {provider} at {host}. Please fix the connection issue.
settings.ollama_models_help: This list is pulled from the Ollama instance configured above.
settings.fallacy_scanning_help: Fallacy scanning analyzes one paragraph at a time, with optional neighboring context. You can fine tune this behavior in the Advanced Options.
settings.timeout_help: Maximum seconds to allow for one paragraph analysis call before it is skipped and the scan continues.
settings.min_chars_help: Skip very short paragraphs to avoid wasting LLM calls on fragments, captions, or headings.
settings.context_radius_help: How many neighboring paragraphs to include on each side of the focus paragraph for context.
settings.context_preview_help: Maximum characters sent for each neighboring context paragraph.
settings.use_stable_seed: Use stable seed for repeatable results
settings.show_model_badge: Show Model badge on Analysis result page
settings.show_unmatched_badge: Show Unmatched badge on Analysis result page
settings.show_paragraphs_badge: Show Paragraphs Analyzed badge on Analysis result page
settings.show_extraction_time_badge: Show Extraction time badge on extraction review page
settings.show_fallacy_type_badges: Show fallacy-type badges on Analysis result page by default
settings.save_hint: Test the active provider connection before saving settings.
settings.waiting_successful_test: Waiting for a successful connection test…
settings.connection_failed_retest: Connection test failed. Fix the issue and test again before saving.
settings.ollama_settings_changed: Ollama settings changed. Test the connection again before saving.
settings.api_settings_changed: API settings changed. Test the connection again before saving.
settings.must_test_before_save: You must pass the active provider connection test before saving settings.
errors.invalid_url: Please enter a valid http(s) URL (including https://).
errors.paste_empty: Please paste some text before starting the analysis.
errors.paste_more_text: Please paste a bit more text so the analyzer has enough material to evaluate.
errors.paste_not_substantial: The pasted text does not look substantial enough to analyze.
errors.no_openai_key: OpenAI is selected, but no OpenAI API key is saved in Settings.
errors.extract_failed_page: Could not extract article text from that page (it may be paywalled, blocked, or heavily JS-rendered).
errors.load_saved_failed_status: Could not load the saved result ({status})
errors.pasted_job_not_completed: The pasted-text analysis job could not be completed.
errors.pasted_job_not_finished: The pasted-text analysis did not finish successfully.
errors.no_extracted_text: No extracted text is available for analysis.
errors.this_url_already_analyzed: This URL has already been analyzed.
errors.url_already_analyzed_on: This URL was already analyzed on {analyzed_at} using {model_label}. Use the duplicate-check prompt on the home page to rerun it or load the saved result.
settings.error.enter_openai_base_url: Please enter an OpenAI-compatible base URL before testing the connection.
settings.error.enter_api_key: Please enter an API key before testing the connection.
settings.error.openai_model_unavailable: The configured model "{model_name}" is not available at the tested OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
settings.error.enter_ollama_base_url: Please enter an Ollama base URL before testing the connection.
settings.error.ollama_model_unavailable: The configured Ollama model "{model_name}" is not available at the tested Ollama instance.
job.extraction_complete_review: Extraction complete. Review the extracted text before analysis.
job.timed_out_paragraph: Timed out on paragraph {current} of {total}; continuing…
messages.analysis_saved_to_history: This analysis was saved to history for future reuse ({model_label}).
messages.analysis_not_added_duplicate: This analysis was not added to saved history because this URL already has a saved result for {model_label}.
messages.no_extracted_text_available: No extracted text is available for analysis.
result.hover_click_reasoning: Hover over highlighted text to view the fallacy type. Click a highlighted passage to expand the reasoning.
result.hover_only: Hover over highlighted text to view the fallacy type.
fallacy.explanation_suffix: In practice, the key question is whether the conclusion is supported by evidence and logic, or whether it depends on this reasoning shortcut instead.
errors.related_preference_save_failed: Could not save the related-items preference.
result.no_reasoning_returned: No additional reasoning was returned for this finding.
errors.provider_connection_required: Connection to AI provider could not be established. To continue, please go to Settings and establish a connection.
messages.analysis_differs_saved_prompt: A saved result already exists for this URL and model ({model_label}), but this new analysis differs from what is currently stored. Do you want to replace the saved result with this one?
messages.analysis_saved_over_existing: The saved history entry was updated with this new analysis ({model_label}).
messages.analysis_kept_existing_saved_hi: The previously saved history entry was left unchanged ({model_label}).
messages.history_resolution_not_required: There is no saved-history conflict to resolve for this analysis.
errors.invalid_history_resolution: Please choose whether to replace the saved result or keep the existing one.
